name: tripwire
identity: A hidden trap mechanism disguised by fresh snow, consisting of a tripwire connected to a net-like contraption woven from thick, icy vines.
current_status: Triggered by the player character, dropping from the boughs above to ensnare them in a frosty mesh while delivering a bludgeoning blow to the shoulder.

composition.value: tripwire, net-like contraption, thick icy vines
